targets.label: Gym Lifting
targets.application: Full-body power blocks & finishing strength days

ai_coach.headline: No telemetry synced today -- proceed on the standard Gym Lifting protocol and log as you go.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, RHR, or body battery data came through this morning, so there's no objective readiness signal to work from. Default to a conservative approach: warm up thoroughly and use the first working set of your main lift as a live readiness check before loading up.
action_plan: Log last night's sleep and morning HRV/RHR in Garmin/Hevy so today's readiness read isn't a blind spot
Warm up progressively on the first compound lift and use bar speed on the last warm-up set to gauge true readiness
If bar speed is normal, hold or add a small load/rep increase on the primary lift per the deficit-protection rule
Hit 60g+ protein at the pre-workout meal and prioritize carbs around the session per the 60% pre/post pacing rule
Log the session in Hevy immediately post-workout so PRs and load history stay current
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Target is 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carbs / 68g fat for this Gym Lifting day -- nothing logged yet, so build the plate now, front-loading ~186g of the day's carbs (60%) into the pre- and post-workout meals, and hit 3.5-4.0L fluids.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight has been logged yet, so there's nothing to compare against the glide path toward the 83.0 kg target -- get a scale entry in today to re-anchor the trend line.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry synced (sleep, HRV, RHR, battery, steps) -- readiness is currently a blind spot
0 of 4 scheduled gym days logged this cycle (0% adherence) -- confirm whether sessions are happening but not logged, or being missed
No nutrition logged today against a 2750 kcal target -- risk of under- or over-shooting without tracking

overview.summary: Every core metric -- weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, body battery -- is empty for today, so there's no synthesized read possible on overall state.
overview.suggestion: Open Garmin and the scale app now and log this morning's weight, sleep, and HRV before training so today isn't another data gap.

plan.summary: With zero weight history and no glide path points logged, progress toward the 83.0 kg target can't be assessed right now.
plan.suggestion: Log today's body weight to re-establish a current point on the glide path toward 83.0 kg.

training.summary: Readiness and load are both null and gym adherence sits at 0 of 4 scheduled days logged this cycle, so there's no basis yet to call for a push or a back-off.
training.suggestion: Treat today as a normal-intensity Gym Lifting session but use the first working set's bar speed as your live readiness gauge, and back off the last set or two if it drifts slow.

gym.summary: No recent session data or PRs have synced from Hevy, so there's nothing to reference for today's split placement.
gym.suggestion: Log today's session in Hevy immediately after training so PRs and split sequencing stay current for tomorrow's read.

sleep.summary: No sleep data came through for last night, and stress/body-battery trend is unavailable.
sleep.suggestion: Sync your sleep tracker before training and, if last night was short, shift tonight's bedtime 30-45 minutes earlier to protect recovery.

nutrition.summary: Nothing has been logged yet against today's 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb / 68g fat Gym Lifting target.
nutrition.suggestion: Log meals as you go today, concentrating roughly 186g of carbs into the pre- and post-workout windows per the pacing rule.
